nasb.text: But I want you to understand that Christ is the head of every man, and the man is the head of a woman, and God is the head of Christ.

esv.text: But I want you to understand that the head of every man is Christ, the head of a wife is her husband, and the head of Christ is God.

cnv.text: 但是我願意你們知道，基督是男人的頭，男人是女人的頭，　神是基督的頭。

ccb.text: 我希望你们知道，基督是男人的头，丈夫是妻子的头，上帝是基督的头。

csbs.text: 但是我愿你们知道：基督是每一个男人的头，男人是女人的头，而神是基督的头。
